name: lumo
description: Mobile UI/UX design intelligence for Android (Compose / XML) and iOS (SwiftUI / UIKit) grounded in cognitive science.

plugins.name: lumo
plugins.description: WCAG validator with OKLCH auto-correct, cross-platform Compose vs SwiftUI parity diff, and theory-of-design (Fitts / Hick / Gestalt) layout checks. Ships with a CLI, an MCP server, and a Claude Code skill.
